goal: prime_ideal_preimage[R, S](f, p).as_ideal.contains(x) = prime_ideal_preimage[R, S](f, p).contains(x)
prime_ideal_preimage[R, S](f, p).as_ideal.contains(x) = ideal_preimage[R, S](f, p.as_ideal).contains(x)
prime_ideal_preimage[R, S](f, p).as_ideal.contains(x) = ideal_preimage[R, S](f, p.as_ideal).contains(x)

p.c: not forall(x0: R) { x0 ∈ prime_ideal_preimage[R, S](f, p).as_ideal = x0 ∈ ideal_preimage[R, S](f, p.as_ideal) } or prime_ideal_preimage[R, S](f, p).as_ideal = ideal_preimage[R, S](f, p.as_ideal)

exists(k0: R) { k0 ∈ prime_ideal_preimage[R, S](f, p).as_ideal != k0 ∈ ideal_preimage[R, S](f, p.as_ideal) }
